daily_summary.headline: Exciting Day for Space Enthusiasts: Multiple Launches and Aurora Possibilities!

top_events.title: Falcon 9 Block 5 | Starlink Group 10-44
top_events.description: A batch of 29 satellites for the Starlink mega-constellation - SpaceX's project for space-based Internet communication system.
top_events.action: Watch live stream for the launch from Cape Canaveral.

top_events.title: Falcon 9 Block 5 | Transporter 16 (Dedicated SSO Rideshare)
top_events.description: Dedicated rideshare flight to a sun-synchronous orbit with dozens of small microsatellites and nanosatellites for commercial and government customers.
top_events.action: Tune in for the live stream of the rideshare mission.

top_events.title: Aurora Viewing Opportunity
top_events.description: Possible aurora at high latitudes with a Kp index of 4.67, best for northern locations (65°+).
top_events.action: Check conditions for aurora visibility if you're in high latitude areas.

opportunities.recommendation: Possible aurora at high latitudes. Best for northern locations (65°+). Worth checking if conditions are optimal.
